meaning: Asian Broadcast Union,亚洲广播联盟
examples: Abu is not his real name, but it's one he uses to disguise his identity.
His real name was Sabri al-Banna, but he became widely known by his nom de guerre, Abu Nidal.
The president, Lee Myung-bak, flew off to Abu Dhabi on the eve of the decision to gladhand the locals.
Abu Qatada was born in Bethlehem in 1960 and spent his early life in Jordan.
The article 'Stopover in Abu Dhabi' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
